textPlain: The page on AWS for S3 access to the data: https://registry.opendata.aws/smithsonian-open-access/

The Smithsonian is also very helpful if you want a photo of some document they haven’t digitized yet. Pay a tiny fee, wait a bit, and they’ll scan in whatever !! Super cool of themGot some original design drawings of the first oil rigs ever built which added a lot to a roleplaying game I was running
Please contact the OCIO Help Desk for additional support.
Well I'd very much like to see those!
